samples.en: They always act on their own.
samples.vi: Những người ấy luôn làm theo ý mình.

samples.pinyin: nà běn hànyǔ shū shì shéi de?
samples.en: Whose Chinese book is that?

samples.pinyin: nà bùshì wǒ de shǒujī.
samples.en: That is not my phone.

samples.pinyin: nǐ méi lái, nà wǒ jiù zìjǐ qù.
samples.en: You didn’t come, so I’ll go by myself.

samples.pinyin: zhème lěng, nà dài zàijiā ba.
samples.en: It’s so cold, so stay at home.

samples.pinyin: tā duì shízhuāng hěn yǒu xìngqù.
samples.en: She is very interested in fashion.

samples.pinyin: zhè jiā diàn mài gè zhǒng fúzhuāng.
samples.en: This store sells various kinds of clothing.

samples.meaning: deck; adorn; attire; decorate; dress up
samples.pinyin: tā xǐhuan zhuāngbàn chéng gōngzhǔ.
samples.en: She likes to dress up as a princess.
samples.vi: Cô ấy thích hóa trang thành công chúa.

samples.meaning: deck; adorn; attire; decorate; dress up
samples.pinyin: yǎnyuánmen zài hòutái zhuāngbàn.
samples.en: The actors are dressing up backstage.
samples.vi: Các diễn viên đang trang điểm ở phía sau sân khấu.

samples.pinyin: zhè bùguò shìgè xiǎo wèntí.
samples.en: This is just a small problem.
samples.vi: Đây chỉ là vấn đề nhỏ thôi.

samples.pinyin: tā bùguò shì kāi gè wánxiào.
samples.en: He is just making a joke.
samples.vi: Anh ấy chỉ là đùa chút thôi.

samples.sentence: 他很聰明，不過不夠努力。
samples.pinyin: tā hěn cōngmíng, bùguò bu gòu nǔlì.
samples.en: He is smart, but not hardworking enough.

samples.pinyin: tiānqì hěn hǎo, bùguò yǒudiǎn lěng.
samples.en: The weather is nice, but a bit cold.

samples.meaning: commit to; hand (or turn) over to
samples.sentence: 他按時交付了工作任務。
samples.pinyin: tā ànshí jiāofùle gōngzuò rènwù.
samples.en: He delivered the work task on time.

samples.meaning: commit to; hand (or turn) over to
samples.sentence: 我把這項任務託付給你了。
samples.pinyin: wǒ bǎ zhè xiàng rènwù tuōfù gěi nǐle.
samples.en: I entrust this task to you.

samples.pinyin: tā bàba xìng fù.
samples.en: His father's surname is Fu.
samples.vi: Bố anh ấy họ Phó.

samples.meaning: used for a set of things or for facial expressions
samples.pinyin: tā mǎile yī fù chájù.
samples.en: He bought a tea set.

samples.meaning: used for a set of things or for facial expressions
samples.pinyin: tā dàizhe yī fù ěrhuán.
samples.en: She is wearing a pair of earrings.

samples.pinyin: wǒ shōu dàole yī fēng xìn.
samples.en: I received a letter.

samples.pinyin: tā shōu dàole tā de lǐwù.
samples.en: She got his gift.

samples.sentence: 真不好意思, 我遲到了。
samples.pinyin: zhēn bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ chídàole.
samples.en: I’m really sorry, I’m late.
samples.vi: Thật xin lỗi, tôi tới trễ rồi.

samples.sentence: 不好意思! 踩著你的腳了。
samples.pinyin: bù hǎoyìsi! cǎizhe nǐ de jiǎole.
samples.en: Sorry! I stepped on your foot.
samples.vi: Xin lỗi! Tôi dẫm lên chân bạn rồi.

items.vi: không sao đâu / không có gì

samples.meaning: that's O.K; it's nothing; never mind; it doesn't matter
samples.pinyin: méiguānxi, wǒ huì bāng nǐ.
samples.en: It's okay, I'll help you.
samples.vi: Không sao, tôi sẽ giúp bạn.

samples.meaning: that's O.K; it's nothing; never mind; it doesn't matter
samples.pinyin: méiguānxi, wǒ méi shēngqì.
samples.en: It's okay, I'm not angry.
samples.vi: Không sao, tôi không giận đâu.
